name: SAP Ariba
receives: Supplier master updates · contract metadata · spend records
scope: All vendor data, contract renewals, spend deltas

name: Negotiation Buddy (Pactum)
receives: High-value renewal flags · price benchmark inputs · BATNA prompts

name: RFx Agent
receives: RFP-triggers from contract pipeline · scoring criteria · shortlist seed
scope: Oracle replacement RFP · Workday benchmark RFP · Pega alternative scout

name: Contracting Agent (DocuSign CLM)
receives: Risk-driven clauses · Scope 3 attestation language · cert renewal triggers
scope: All Tier-1 renewals in next 12 months

name: TPRM (Abi)
receives: Risk register updates · ESG flags · ISO/Cyber Essentials lapses

name: Spend Analytics (Power BI)
receives: Monthly spend deltas · sub-category breakdown · variance alerts

name: Cat-Plan Builder
receives: PESTLE updates · risk register · regulatory landscape · sourcing strategy
scope: Category strategy doc — IT Software v3.2

name: Owner Notifications (Outlook)
receives: Per-risk notifications to contract owners · cert chase emails (English/Spanish)

name: MS Teams — Procurement Channel
receives: Executive summary · high-priority risk card · weekly digest link

name: OFGEM RIIO-3 Evidence Locker
receives: IT supply-chain resilience attestations · cert evidence · DR test results
